body:
## Summary

Adds Phase 0 spec review. Every spec.md passes three-layer adversarial review before run-spec proceeds.

### R-008: Spec Input Review (proposed constitution amendment)

Every spec.md, whether human-written or AI-generated, MUST pass Phase 0 spec review before /ai-driver:run-spec proceeds to Phase 1. Spec review is unconditional.

**Approval gate:** reply `approve R-008 as-is` to accept, `reject R-008: <reason>` to reject.
